5007.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension adding start and end time properties to NFT tokens.
5007.notes: Optional composable extension supports splitting/merging time-based NFTs.

5008.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension adding nonce to prevent marketplace order replay attacks.
5008.notes: Nonce increments on token transfer to invalidate stale orders.

5018.one_line_summary: Filesystem-like interface for reading and writing binary objects in contracts.
5018.notes: Supports chunked I/O for large files; enables Web3 resource discovery via EIP-4804.

5023.one_line_summary: Non-fungible shareable tokens that can be copied and shared while retaining original.
5023.notes: Shareable non-transferable variant enables reputation/contribution tracking via share events.

5050.one_line_summary: Action messaging protocol for interactive NFTs with optional modular state environments.
5050.notes: Enables NFT-to-NFT interaction; state contracts broker execution; validation via action hash.

5058.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension with locking mechanism to prevent transfer while maintaining custody.
5058.notes: NFTs remain in owner wallet while locked; enables NFTFi without escrow risk.

5094.one_line_summary: URL format for representing Ethereum network configurations for wallet integration.
5094.notes: Extension of EIP-831; allows deep linking and QR codes for network addition.

5095.one_line_summary: Principal tokens (zero-coupon) redeemable for underlying ERC-20 at maturity.
5095.notes: Standardizes yield tokenization and fixed-rate money markets; extends ERC-20.

5114.one_line_summary: Soulbound badge token bound immutably to another NFT at mint time.
5114.notes: Non-transferable; requires content-addressable URIs for metadata; bound to NFT personas.

5115.one_line_summary: Standardized Yield token interface for composable wrapped yield-bearing assets.
5115.notes: More flexible than ERC-4626; supports multiple input/output tokens and reward handling.

5131.one_line_summary: ENS-based authentication linking secondary wallets to prove primary wallet control.
5131.notes: Uses ENS text records for safer signing via secondary wallets; one-to-many auth relationship.

5139.one_line_summary: JSON schema format for lists of RPC providers with chain compatibility information.
5139.notes: Supports semantic versioning; publishable via ENS or HTTPS; enables provider switching.

5143.one_line_summary: ERC-4626 vault extension adding slippage protection for EOA interactions.
5143.notes: Overloaded deposit/mint/withdraw/redeem functions with min/max output bounds.

5164.one_line_summary: Cross-chain execution interface for dispatching and executing messages across EVM chains.
5164.notes: MessageDispatcher (origin) and MessageExecutor (destination); unique messageIds prevent replay.

5169.one_line_summary: Add scriptURI to token contracts pointing to associated client-side executable scripts.
5169.notes: Supports multiple URIs for redundancy; compatible with existing token standards.
